Click the button to view a PDF document generated by JavaScript PDF Library. Please note that Adobe Reader or its equivalent is required to view the resultant document.

This feature can be used to stamp the PDF document for draft, confidential, review purpose only, company logo, copyright notice, and more. More information about the watermark can be found in this documentation section.
